title: Vacancy
text:
I am looking for self-motivated students to join our group. If you are passionate about software engineering and AI, please read on!


Graduate Students (PhD / Master by Research)
Applications for Fall 2026 admission are now closed. However, if you are a very strong candidate, we may make exceptions on a case-by-case basis — please contact me at zy25@ualberta.ca with your CV and a brief description of your research interests.



Current UofA Students
If you are a current University of Alberta student (e.g., a Master’s student in the ECE Department, or an undergraduate) and are interested in conducting research in our group, please contact me at zy25@ualberta.ca with your CV.



Undergraduate Individual Studies
If you are a UofA undergraduate interested in taking an individual study course (CMPUT 399 or CMPUT 499), please contact me at zy25@ualberta.ca with your CV.



Contact
For all inquiries, please reach out to Prof. Zhou Yang.

title: U-A-Goose
text:
We are the U-a-Goose (GrOup Of Software Engineering) group at University of Alberta.

  









[2026.03] Dr. Zhou Yang win the MSR Outstanding Doctoral Reserch Award🏆! There is only one awardee this year.
[2026.01] One paper (on automatically protecting critical software operations in TEE) is accepted by IEEE Transactions on Software Engineering!

title: U-A-Goose

title: Team
text:
Assistant Professor at the University of Alberta, Fellow at Amii (Alberta Machine Intelligence Institute)
Dr. Zhou Yang is an Assistant Professor at the University of Alberta and a Fellow at the Alberta Machine Intelligence Institute (Amii). He received his Ph.D. from Singapore Management University and his M.Sc. from University College London. His research focuses on building strong foundation models for complex software systems, developing trusted AI for software engineering, and analyzing the socio-technical impact of AI on open-source software and developer productivity.
📧 zy25@ualberta.ca | 🔗 Google Scholar | 🌐 Homepage
